name: See You Tomorrow
overview: Ding Liaoliao, an enthusiastic TV writer, and Jiang Kan, a reserved pharmacist, unexpectedly become roommates despite their opposite personalities. Their lives become intertwined through work and daily interactions, leading to unexpected bonds. Also living with them are Ding's younger brother and a TV anchor, who are enjoying a blossoming romance. Together, the four navigate humorous and heartwarming moments, facing life's challenges as they grow closer and support each other.
